svg.text: Unified Multimodal Perceiver-Decision Transformer for a Screen-Based Clash Royale Agent
Screen-only observation → YOLO detection → multimodal tokens → Perceiver fusion → Decision Transformer → policy heads

g.text: → packed into one detection record per box
— all live in the same embedding space.
Transformer, one frame at a time.
where to deploy on a 36 × 64 grid
PaddleOCR (timer / center-text) · ResNet card & elixir classifiers · episode cutting (cut_episodes.py) · handcrafted SARBuilder logic · separate spatial-then-temporal stages.
